Subscribe to ADA CE

Get access to 500+ hours of on-demand CE courses 24/7 with a CE Subscription. Just $199 for Members.

Learn more

Earn CE the way you want

Live Workshops & Seminars

Live Webinars
 

Online Courses
 

Upcoming Schedule

April — June
April 17 Dental Leadership: Mastering Difficult Conversations, Team Communication & Compliance (Live Webinar)
May 15 Management of the Open Apex: Practical Endodontic Strategies for the General Dentist (Live Webinar)
June 12–13 Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration (Live Workshop)
July — September
Sept. 8–16 Pharmacology — Your Most Valuable Instrument in Treating Today’s Medically Complex Dental Patient (Umbria, Italy; Travel Destination CE)
Sept. 11–12 Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration (Live Workshop)
October — December
Oct. 29–Nov. 6 Pharmacology — Your Most Valuable Instrument in Treating Today’s Medically Complex Dental Patient (Barcelona; Travel Destination CE)
Nov. 6–7 Botulinum Toxins, Dermal Fillers, TMJ Pain Therapy and Gum Regeneration (Live Workshop)

Online Courses

New Online Courses
  • ADA Clinical Recommendations: Optimizing Radiation Safety in Dentistry | Patient Selection for Dental Radiography and Cone Beam Computed Tomography
  • Advanced Pain Control in Dentistry Overview: Local Anesthesia and Analgesia
  • Beyond the Mirror: Body Dysmorphic Disorder and Its Impact on Dental Care
  • Pediatric Dentistry Essentials: Confident Care and Strategies for Young Smiles
  • The Practice Side of Fluoride: Patient Education and Addressing Misinformation
  • And more new courses
Best-selling Online Courses
  • DEA MATE Act Opioid Prescriber Compliance Training
  • ADA Dental Coding Certificate: Assessment-Based CDT Program 2026 (books included)
  • Managing Sedation Complications
  • 2026 CDT Codes: Clinical Practice Series
  • Neurodiversity Training: Sensory Sensitive Dentistry
  • And more popular courses
New! Certificate Program

Patient Service Coordinator Program
Upskill and onboard your administrative team with the knowledge and skills to thrive.

Explore CE by product type

Live Workshops & Seminars
Hands-on practice to immersive learning — Live Workshops enable you to learn and thrive.
Live Webinars
The impact of an in-person course without leaving your space! Topics include opioids, MATE Act & more.
Online Courses
Learn what you want, whenever and wherever. Access these 300+ courses covering topics you want.
CE Subscriptions
Get access to 300+ courses 24/7 with an ADA CE Subscription.
ADA 2026 Scientific Session
Translate science into practice at the ADA 2026 Scientific Session, Oct. 8–10 in Indianapolis.

Find out your state’s required hours, renewal details, deadlines and more.

Learn about the program, view CERP-recognized providers and look up courses.
